## Themes

### guro

- Download [guro.zip](https://github.com/thechelsuk/uk.thechels.themes.nnw/releases/download/v1.3.0/guro.zip) to install this theme.

### thechelsuk

- Download [thechelsuk.zip](https://github.com/thechelsuk/uk.thechels.themes.nnw/releases/download/v1.3.0/thechelsuk.zip) to install this theme.

## NetNewsWire Install Links

- [Install guro in NetNewsWire](netnewswire://theme/add?url=https://github.com/thechelsuk/uk.thechels.themes.nnw/releases/download/v1.3.0/guro.zip)
- [Install thechelsuk in NetNewsWire](netnewswire://theme/add?url=https://github.com/thechelsuk/uk.thechels.themes.nnw/releases/download/v1.3.0/thechelsuk.zip)
